# Resources.IsResourceUri method

Returns `true` when *value* is a string in URI format [RFC 3986] usable as a concrete `Resource.uri`. Delegates to [`IsResourceUri`](../UriTemplate/IsResourceUri.md). (§17.4, R-17.4-a, R-17.4-b)

```csharp
public static bool IsResourceUri(string? value)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| value | The candidate URI string. |

## Return Value

`true` when the value is an absolute RFC 3986 URI with a scheme.
